name: WhatsApp Skill
description: Open WhatsApp chats, send messages by contact name or phone number, and search inside conversations.

toolDeclarations.name: open_whatsapp_chat
toolDeclarations.description: Open a WhatsApp chat by contact name or international phone number.

contactName.description: The contact name as it appears in WhatsApp. Use this when no phone number is known.

phoneNumber.description: International phone number for wa.me, preferably including country code.

prefillMessage.description: Optional text to prefill when opening by phone number.

toolDeclarations.name: send_whatsapp_message
toolDeclarations.description: Send a WhatsApp message to a contact. Prefer phoneNumber when available because it uses WhatsApp's direct wa.me flow; otherwise use contactName search.

contactName.description: The name of the contact as it appears in WhatsApp

phoneNumber.description: International phone number, preferably including country code. Use if the user gives a number.

delaySeconds.description: Optional delay before sending, in seconds.

delayMs.description: Optional delay before sending, in milliseconds.

autonomous.description: If true, the AI will automatically tap the send button. Only use this if the user has explicitly given permission or enabled global autonomy.

toolDeclarations.name: search_whatsapp_chat
toolDeclarations.description: Open a WhatsApp chat and search within that conversation.

contactName.description: The contact name as it appears in WhatsApp.

query.description: Text to search for inside the chat.
